overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of a futuristic urban environment. The player walks along a palm-lined city sidewalk with neon billboards, crosses a street intersection, and transitions to driving on an elevated highway through an industrial Petrochem district with massive pipelines and concrete overpasses.

silver sedan and other vehicles pass by on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past concrete planters with palm trees, glancing at passing vehicles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. A pedestrian passes close by on the left, while the camera moves past palm tree planters and a metal fence. Digital billboards adorn the modern building to the left, and vehicles occasionally pass on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and neon signage

events.description: leaving the sidewalk to enter the crosswalk and cross the street
entering a vehicle and transitioning from walking to driving perspective

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, then entering a vehicle and accelerating onto the highway

woman standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross

building with prominent circular neon sign and 'KINOSHI' text signage
concrete barrier along the edge of the highway
concrete barrier along the right edge of the highway
massive industrial complex with 'PETROCHEM' signage on multiple buildings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a crosswalk, passing a woman standing near the intersection and a red sports car driving through. The Kinoshi building with its distinctive circular neon sign becomes visible. After crossing, the perspective shifts to driving as the vehicle enters the highway, leaving the sidewalk and fence behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through industrial district with petrochemical facilities

events.description: entering the elevated highway overpass with industrial structures
passing under massive concrete overpass with steam vents and industrial pipelines

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the highway through the industrial zone, passing under massive concrete structures

notable_agents.action: black car driving ahead on the highway in the same direction

entered.detail: large yellow industrial pipes crossing over the highway connecting buildings
massive concrete highway support structures with steam vents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along an elevated highway through a massive industrial complex. The Petrochem facility dominates the view ahead with its imposing gray buildings and connecting pipelines. The camera passes under huge concrete overpass structures with steam vents, following a black car ahead while concrete guardrails line both sides of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from a pedestrian stroll through a neon-lit city center to a high-speed drive onto an elevated highway. It begins by moving along a futuristic sidewalk past palm tree planters and a metal fence, while digital billboards glow on the adjacent modern buildings. As the camera reaches a crosswalk, it passes a waiting pedestrian and a red sports car before the view opens up to reveal the circular neon sign of the Kinoshi building. The scene then shifts seamlessly from walking to driving as the perspective enters a vehicle, leaving the urban sidewalk behind to merge into the flow of highway traffic.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated highway that plunges deep into the heart of a massive industrial complex. It begins with the vehicle cruising forward, following a black car as the imposing gray structures of the Petrochem facility dominate the horizon. As the camera advances, the open road narrows beneath huge concrete overpass structures where steam vents release plumes into the air. The scene then shifts further into the industrial zone, gliding past concrete guardrails that frame the path toward the facility's dense network of connecting pipelines.
